title: Relationship Intelligence
description: A pack for users who want stronger recall on people, commitments, meeting outcomes, and relationship signals across a longer history.

entrypoints.trigger: Need context on a person before a call
Need to query a theme or person across meetings
Want to review wins, losses, or behavior patterns

notes: Optimized for relationship-heavy operators, founders, and customer-facing work.
Pairs well with tagging meetings so mirror and graph get better over time.
